name: C-8 risk-classify exits two on an unknown use-case with a hint pointing at EU AI Act references
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/risk-classify.sh" --use-case made-up-thing --emit r.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'unknown' err.txt && grep -q 'EU AI Act' err.txt && echo rejected 1>&2
